pseudoParts._reason: S5 (DESIGN §5.4): pseudo-element decor has no anatomy spelling — captured, receipted, not carried

bindingContradictions.cause: equal-specificity cascade across two axes: .Polaris-TextField--slim's min-height (p.height-700 = 28px) source-orders after .Polaris-TextField--borderless's (p.space-800 = 32px), so borderless+slim renders 28px — a variant×size condition, refused from single-axis resolution by the mint discipline; named residue (capture-only component)

variant-conditioned border removal: .Polaris-TextField--borderless sets border:none on the backdrop — computed border-width is 0 for the borderless variant while the carried base binding paints 1px on the inherit variant. Single-axis partition (variant) — resolve via the review queue (--to {p.border-width-0}; several zero-valued tokens share 0px, border-width-0 is the exact name-class match)

variant-conditioned border removal: .Polaris-TextField--borderless sets border:none on the backdrop — computed border-color falls back to the element's currentColor (the p.color-text body chain), not the carried p.color-input-border; the real fact is 'no border' (border-width 0), and a color rebind would dress a vacuous channel as a binding — named residue (the border-width channel resolves to {p.border-width-0} instead)

equal-specificity cascade across two axes: .Polaris-TextField--slim's min-height (p.height-700 = 28px) source-orders after .Polaris-TextField--borderless's (p.space-800 = 32px), so borderless+slim renders 28px — a variant×size condition, refused from single-axis resolution by the mint discipline; named residue (capture-only component)

Single-axis partition (variant) — resolve via the review queue (--to {p.border-width-0}; several zero-valued tokens share 0px, border-width-0 is the exact name-class match)
